CustomField.description: A multiplier used with Installment Period to define how often installments occur. For example, a frequency of 3 with a Monthly period means every 3 months. Defaults to 1.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How many periods between installments. For example, 1 = every month, 3 = every 3 months (when the period is Monthly).
CustomField.label: Installment Frequency
